reviews.review_text: We were on the riverside power sites,great views . The staff are super friendly and the amenities are great we had the best stay ,and you can have a fire by the river ,thanks
Great location to stay.
What a beautiful park the staff are there to please are polite ,professional ,and happy the amenities are the best in 20,000 ks. Great location central to everything.
Excellent site and great park location. Toilet block was warm and clean. Can walk everywhere. Loved it.

We loved the facilities, the cleanliness is second to none & the staff are lovely. Cant explain how much I loved the warm, fresh & so, so clean bathrooms!!
Just a beautiful park, see you next time!! Mel & Dave
Nice park right in town. Good facilities.
Didn't go there! Can't review this place!
Perfect for the motorhome
Just arrived here in love with this place already
Great park, great location! Not sure if you can get any more central than the Bright Riverside Holiday Park!

We had a fantastic stay at Bright Riverside Holiday Park! The location is perfect—right by the river and surrounded by beautiful scenery. It’s a peaceful and relaxing place, ideal for a getaway.

The accommodation was clean, modern, and well-equipped with everything we needed. The park facilities were also well maintained, and the overall atmosphere was very welcoming.

Perfect for families or anyone looking to unwind in nature. W
Great location on the river.  5 minute walk into town.  Spotless amenities
Such a welcoming experience staying in the alpine pods with so much to do and the service was ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ thankyou to Nicol for making our country escape one to remember
Truly a hidden gem , cosy, beautiful rooms and very stylish. I will come back for another visit to enjoy spring in Bright thank you for the amazing stay Nicol

We had stayed there for two nights and it was really hot and the fan was broken it was loud and ratily also the top bunk beds railing was almost about to fall off its hinges. It was very unsafe but overall it was ok
Amazing stay! Can’t wait to come back. 😊
We have left the gravel pit in the park. The price charged they could supply shade cloth- or astro turf as a slab. Sites too small for 20' plus foot Vans. Won't be back.

The location is the best thing about this place. However, the accommodation itself leaves a lot to be desired. I am in Alpine Pod 15. The room is clean, but very hot and the aircon did not do anything. Put aircon on at 22 as told by reception, but it was not effective at all and it is hotter inside than out. Tried to go out for reprieve, but then the code I was given didn't open the boomgate, so had to call for help. Thankfully, someone answered quickly. And was able to go. Upon return, room is still stifling hot. Cannot sleep at all and want to return to Melbourne, but concerned about wildlife so waiting til first light. If I were to return to Bright again, it would probably be at a different accommodation provider or it would be in Autumn or Winter if I were to stay here again.

Sent to campsites which already had campers and the dump point was not working and disgustingly full. Too expensive for what you get which was a dusty camp-site a long way from the amenities. Nearness to the river was a positive.
Perfect location to walk into town. Plenty of bike path options so definitely take your push bike. Beautiful and scenic to sit and relax down by the river.
Had a fantastic time with my family will be coming back again 😊

We had a powered site for our camper trailer and our parents stayed in the Alpine Pod. Both were excellent. The sites were large, concrete and level with easy access. The camp kitchen was amazing with everything you need and a lovely BBQ area. The cabin was cute, cosy and clean. Fantastic location on the river and walk to town. Would stay again.

I experienced very poor customer service over the phone , person who attended the call in the morning mentioned different price then the time of the booking, despite confirming  the price with her 3 times. The difference was around 200 $ per day , there is no mention on website that it will be additional charge for more than 2 person as 2 bedroom riverside villa is for 6 people. She  said she can do the same price anytime if I want to confirm the dates with someone, I literally called after 2 hours and she declined to do the same price. Atleast don’t lie whatever you said and value your customer.

Great location, rude receptionist, very tight sites. I booked 6 powered sites, they put me on the dryest rocky ground even though I told them I'm staying in a tent. 3 toilets for the whole caravan Park not enough. Showers get flooded mind you its new. Hardly any grass. Unsafe 2 plumbing points next to the amenities and the clothesline.
High prices.
Will never be back, there are other places as nice but cheaper and very friendly staff with much better service.

We are staying here now on a powered site, this place is impeccably clean and well maintained, all services we need plus so much more, tv entertainment area, kitchen is so clean and well presented with so many appropriate facilities, the whole layout and the positioning near the river is perfect. Staff have been very friendly and the cabins/villas look so good we want to come back and stay in one. Bathroom facilities are the cleanest and most well maintained I’ve ever seen. It’s honestly so well maintained the whole place. My partner and I are very impressed

Very disappointed, as I booked a cabin but due to emergency illness I couldn't go, asked for credit at least they refused even tho I mentioned i will provide a letter from emergency department but there was no understanding i paid almost $1000 and my kids were supper excited but the policy made me so sad

1 Star – Only for the Location and Scenery

We stayed as two families in the Riverside Villa and paid over $1,000 for two nights. Unfortunately, the experience with management was extremely disappointing.

Despite the villa clearly being designed for multiple guests, management refused to provide us with the access code for the shared toilets on-site, insisting that we use the single toilet inside the villa. Strange, but we accepted it and moved on.

Quiet hours begin at 10pm, yet the venues directly across the road are loud well past that time — again, not a major issue for us, but worth noting.

What was an issue was discovering that the price of the villa drops to nearly half if booked on arrival, meaning we ended up paying almost double simply for booking in advance.

The biggest frustration came at check-out. Even though we thoroughly cleaned the villa, removed all rubbish, washed the dishes that morning, and left everything in the drying rack, we were still charged an additional cleaning fee. When we questioned it, we were told the dishes needed to be “rewashed” and that a “dirty tablecloth” needed cleaning. The irony? The tablecloth was our own disposable one used for an anniversary cake — and after explaining that, the staff member still insisted it was “dirty” and needed to be thrown out (as disposable items usually are…).

We were also told the pan had “burn marks on the bottom.” It’s your pan, your gas stove — perhaps consider better cookware instead of penalising guests.

After checking Google reviews, it’s very clear there is a pattern of a certain racial group being targeted with these extra cleaning charges, which is extremely concerning.

Overall, we paid over $1,000 for two nights and were left feeling frustrated and unwelcome. The only redeeming quality of this stay was the beautiful river running through the property — Bright itself is stunning, and we still made the most of our trip despite the poor service.

I would not recommend staying here based on our experience.

Perfect family destination! The stream infront of our villa was so serene and fun for the whole family to enjoy. Lots of activities for the kids and wonderful serenity walks to go on. Cant wait to go again!!

Best location ever, loads of trees if you want to be by the river or one row back. People are beautiful and amazingly helpful. Facilities super modern and clean. Looks like there's some gorgeous new cabins around too so you absolutely can't go wrong
Thank you to Sheree, Anthony and the team our stay was awesome and they were very helpful.. Thank you!

First time staying here and I can't wait to come back. The facilities are all modern and clean. The place has amazing views of the mountains by the river and with in a very short walk to the town centre. Sheree and AJ were friendly and kind to deal with and nothing was a hassle. Thank you guys again.

Great place . best staff, they go above and beyond for service .
Thanks you guys for hospitality. Sorry bout the sort notice
Great place to stay. Central to town, staff are great and facilities are excellent.
Excellent campsite for the kids

Let us stay in a cabin at the very last minute even after reception closed because our tent was mouldy when we arrived. Was so kind and helpful. Amenities were also the cleanest I’ve ever seen in a holiday park. Had the best experience ever thanks to the staff and it was the most beautiful location!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Absolutely loved our stay at Bright Riverside Caravan Park! From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel genuinely welcome — friendly, helpful, and always up for a chat that makes you feel like part of the family. The grounds are immaculate — lush, green, and perfectly maintained — you can tell there’s real pride in the place.

The location couldn’t be better: right by the river and only a short stroll into town, close to everything yet peaceful enough to feel like your own slice of nature. Whether you’re after relaxation or adventure, this park nails it.

Couldn’t fault a thing — clean amenities, beautiful setting, and a team that clearly cares about their guests. Five stars all the way — we’ll definitely be back!
Amazing location... the sound of the Ovens River is the cherry on top... very tranquil.

The Bright Riverside Holiday Park, is a great place to stay to explore the local area. The location is 10/10 on the Ovens River and a couple hundred meters walk into town! The cabin we stayed in was a little dated but clean and facing the river so all good! They also have new cabins if you prefer! The fire pits are not reserved and you can order wood from reception. Definitely recommend if you’re visiting Bright!

We really enjoyed our stay here. The location was amazing, within easy walking distance to the shops. The amenities were excellent, with showers and toilets always spotless. Everything we needed for a comfortable and convenient stay was right there. Highly recommend, will definitely be back!

BEWARE OF THIS PARKS DYNAMIC PRICING POLICY.
If you book online in advance during the off season, you could pay in excess of $100/night more than if you booked just prior to arrival.
If I had booked online I would have paid $360/night for a cabin that was being charged at $240/night when we arrived and the park was practically empty.
This dynamic pricing policy is not designed to offer a discount to fill vacancies, instead it is designed to extort as much money as possible from unsuspecting customers, and it's a policy that management is proud of. BE WARNED.

Riverside Park is an absolute gem! From the moment we arrived, everything exceeded our expectations. The facilities are second to none – the camp kitchen is the best we’ve seen, beautifully set up with a spacious outdoor area that makes cooking and socialising a pleasure. The bathrooms are modern, spotless, and thoughtfully heated in winter, which made our stay extra comfortable.

The staff were warm, welcoming, and always ready to help, adding a personal touch that made us feel right at home. The location is simply perfect – right on the river with stunning views and just a short stroll into town.

This park really does have it all: fantastic amenities, a beautiful setting, and wonderful people. We can’t recommend it highly enough and can’t wait to return!
Ice
Accommodation and staff were lovely. Location is perfect, really short walk to town. place is kept spotless!

Amazing spot to stay in our caravan on the way to the snow. It was a bit strange to be camping in front of a luxury cabin, but we had a great view of the river. Great facilities and short walk to everything.

Terrific holiday park close to the centre of Bright and right on the Ovens river. We stayed in the Superior Villas and will be coming back. Clean, bright, modern, lovely bathroom and well appointed. Perfect for a family of four with kids sharing a room
Last month visited there with family & friends. They charged us extra money for cleaning and the staff there was very rude. Not happy with the service.

Went with 5 mates. The cabins are very comfortable and got everything you need. Communal kitchen and showers are also very clean and spacious if you have a group. They even let us use the showers after we had checked out which was a bonus after snowboarding all day. Close to town. Definetly recommend 10/10
Worth for the peace and beauty.

This is our third time going there but unfortunately this time the experience was not good. They charged us $300 for extra cleaning without informing us When asked they don’t have any explanation to that. On Saturday night around 10:00 pm their staff member  came to us when we were chilling outside with friends and family around fire pit to pack up everything in 10 minutes and go to sleep. It’s a holiday park people go there for fun and to spend quality time with friends and family, not to sleep there around 10:00 on Saturday night. Very bad experience. Be aware of them everyone.

Don’t book directly from their website, they can charge you whatever they want without explanation, staff is very rude if you ask them anything , never recommend this place, very disappointed with their service

They are scammers, never give you answers, deducted money without informing you, and charged for cleaning for no reason, which we already done before leave the property.They ask us to sleep 10pm on Saturday night which is joke, we booked villa for have fun for  enjoy the holidays not for sleep, we called them they cut the call and blocked my number , don’t recommend to anyone this place

I’ve been to this place last weekend with the five other families we going there every year very nice place that’s why we go every year but always we made a booking threw Booking.com this time. We made a booking direct from them. We were very disappointed with their service, we booked -4 villas. but when we did the checkout they charge us Cleaning fees for two Villa which is $300 without inform us from my card and after that when I’m calling them to find out why they charge us and I’m asking them proof of pictures they’re not providing I email to them. They’re not replying my email so my suggestion to everyone when you go there always make a video and when you check out always make a video again otherwise they can charge you as well. We not going there again. This was our last visit to them. My suggestion to you don’t use ur bank card
Trời tối, tôi không thể bật bếp ga lên. Lưu ý có 1 bật lửa để mồi trong bếp.

This caravan park ticks all the boxes. We stayed on a site by the creek. Large car and van. Brilliant.  The fire pits out side your site on the creek are great. The toilets are heated and extremely clean. The owners that manage the park keep it immaculate. The position to the town is 10/10. Heaps of food restaurants, shops pubs ect. Stayed there a total of 8 nights and will definitely come back. One of the best parks we have stayed.
It's the perfect location right on the river

Our accommodation had all the amenities as advertised. It was very clean and tidy. The accommodation gets warmed up quickly too. There are bonfire facilities. After an amazing snowboarding day out, we had a cozy bonfire night when we reached back. The river view is beautiful. Pretty much all the villas have Riverview.
If you are lucky you will also find kangaroos infront of your villas.

From the accommodation Woolworths is just 3 min walk and town centre is around 10min walk.

My family stayed 2 nights for my little one’s birthday. Indeed a beautiful holiday park with well kept and very clean amenities. The Superior Villa was spacious, tidy, well equipped and spotlessly clean. Everything was picturesque, the sight of the riverside was relaxing, and there was always an activity to do for all ages. The town centre was just a short walk away, with beautiful nearby parks and playground for kids. Highly recommended and will definitely come back! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

We absolutely loved our time at the riverside park!
The facilities were amazing with the best camp kitchen we’ve seen accompanied with a gorgeous outdoor area. The bathrooms were modern, always extremely clean & as a bonus were heated in winter which was fabulous. The staff were super friendly and helpful.
The location of the park is great right on the river just a short walk from town.

Highly recommend! We can’t wait to come back
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Great place near the river and less than 10 mins walk from Bright.

Very neat & tidy park. Excellent camp kitchen, & laundry facilities. Spotlessly clean,  heated shower/toilet which is very nice to walk into from the chill in the air while holidaying in the cooler weather. Keep your eyes peeled after dark for a peek of the possum, while you enjoy the fires. 🔥🦋🐦

Fabulous location and staff who go the extra mile. Staff accommodated multiple families, so that we could go next to each other in cabins. Thank you for making our trip memorable with your care and consideration -  often not seen in today’s world. Thanks again. Mel and families

The most cleanest amenities I’ve ever been to at a caravan park and the camp kitchen also has two TVs one on the inside one on the inside and barbecues everywhere and you close right to the city across the river definitely will be going back regular

We had a really great weekend all 6 of us at Bright Riverside Holiday park! The mobile home/cabin was just perfect and the staff were so helpful but left us to our own devices too which was great! It felt like it was our own little property for the weekend - the open fires are great but make sure to bring your own wood and fire starters etc. The location is perfect to be able to stroll into Bright and we rented bikes too in the town which was great. All round was an excellent trip and the setting is just stunning. We will be back - thank you 🥰
Camped down by the river, what a magical spot. Camp kitchen is amazing, as are the fire places and places to sit by the river. I’ll be back many times

Amazing campsite, staff were so helpful our booking, facilities were great and so clean!
We can’t wait to come back, can’t go wrong with booking this place !

Bright Riverside Holiday Park is one of the best Holiday Parks I have ever stayed at, besides the great location, easy walk to the town center if you need some shopping or dining out, and an easy walking track along the river that loops back to the park. The park and facilities are spotless! I had to ask if the Park was newly built. The friendly staff made us feel very welcome. We enjoyed the evenings sitting outside our Pod with the fire pit simply relaxing. Would highly recommend Bright Riverside Holiday Park to anyone that would like to stay in Bright, very family friendly. Can't wait to return, still lots of places to explore in the surrounds.

Fantastic location on the Ovens River within a short walk to town and lots of walking tracks. The office staff were awesome always  greeting us with a broad smile and happy to try to accommodate our needs. The amenities were second to none. Air conditioned and plenty of cleaning gear. We had a  caravan site right on the river which was awesome. These sites also had fire pits.
It's in the best location in town. You certainly pay for it too. No playground but plenty to do about Bright anyway so didn't really miss it.

A group pf three couples booked two cabins and a caravan site here for the weekend. We chose this weekend because it was mid-April, late autumn, and the off-season (before the snow season). We have visited Bright a few times, this is the best time to see all the trees in full autumn colours !!
The Bright Riverside Holiday Park is very central, just over the river from the town centre. A short 10-minute walk across either of the two bridges will get you to town.
For the accommodation, we had booked the two Alpine Pods. For one couple the size is compact and cozy (code for "a squeeze"). But the Pods were absolutely clean and very suitable for the weekend.
Lots of parking available (allocated bays).
The shared facilities were fantastic - kitchen / lounge / tv. bbq area, and the bathroom / laundry block.
We made use of the lounge, kitchen and bbq facilities - clean and fantastic. We left it as clean as we found it!
Yes, well recommended!
Thank you.

We had a great experience at Bright Riverside Holiday Park. It’s a lovely spot—peaceful, well-maintained, and close to everything in town. We really enjoyed our time there.

We stayed in a cabin, which was clean and cozy, but felt a bit small and tight for our liking—probably just not used to such a compact space. In hindsight, I wish we had booked a villa or one of the superior accommodations for more comfort.

Overall, a very pleasant stay and would definitely consider coming back—just in a bigger room next time!

This is a beautiful location and a well- run, well equipped caravan park. We liked the amenities (always clean, good hot showers and heated bathroom area), the facilities (fire pits, table and chairs). We felt somewhat short changed with sites 22,23,24 at the far end of the river -same (high) price as others further up but with grey water outlets that were unusable because they were uphill. The dump point was high, didn’t drain well and was most unpleasant. The fine gravel sites were a pain.
Despite this we had a lovely week here.

We had a fantastic stay at Riverside Holiday park. The location is absolutely beautiful and convenient. We booked superior villa and it was very clean, modern and comfortable.Highly recommended this park for families .We will definitely be back
The best park I’ve ever stayed at! Amazing facilities, so clean and new, and the location is unbeatable.
Might be alot better if the rooms were cleaned. Not impressed.
Stayed in a camping site. Lovely service, very well kept facilities.

We had a riverside caravan site. Lovely view out to the river and beyond. Staff very friendly. Close to shops and great walks along the Ovens River and the Gorge. Had a very relaxing 4 night stay. Would recommend the park.
Fabulous small caravan park. Ripper facilities,  very clean and well managed,  very affordable. Well be back for sure
Clean cabins, helpful staff. Great location, easy walk to centre of town

What a find..
We had a wonderful experience..
Right on the river..close walking proximity to all amenities.
Super clean and great reception service.
We'll be back
Beautiful caravan park, well maintained and perfectly located. Worth every dollar, I’ll be returning for sure!

5 stars all the way! Service was next level, very accomodating to our holiday changes, nothing was a problem, all smiles. So close to town, great food and beers, and shopping was boutique. Can’t wait til we return to Bright Riverside !
Stayed in their cabins. Spacious and comfortable.  Beautiful surroundings, would love to return.
Loved our stay at Bright Riverside. Staff  are wonderful, the amenities are clean, and close to the town.
Stay here every year long week end.
Great clean Modern facilities great sites and friendly staff
Meticulous attention to detail, spotlessly clean, shady sites, great location, friendly staff…just tick, tick, tick!

Myself and my partner camped here for three nights in a tent. We found this campsite was the perfect location. Short walk to the shop/town and the river is just beside you for a dip or a trail walk/run. The facilities were amazing. Lovely clean, spacious shared kitchen and beautiful outdoor deck/BBQ area to sit and enjoy your meal. Bathroom/showers were super. Very well kept and very clean. Hot water straight away.
We had such a great few days here!!

We stayed for 3 nights on a powered site, site was very spacious and the  sites in the park weren’t on top of each other! The site we were on was dirt and right next to the amenities which was very handy .
Amenities were exceptionally clean and the park itself was very tidy!
Easy stroll into town from the park and the river access from the park is one of the many perks!
The team were very friendly and helpful!

This is one of the best caravan parks we have stayed at.The grounds are immaculately kept.The toilets,camp kitchen,dump point & sites are all exceptional.Staff & management are so helpful and easy to contact and talk to.Bright town centre is an easy 5 minute walk along the footpath.Its so nice being close to the river and the walks.
Wouldn’t recommend this place for camping. Sites are very average.
We absolutely loved the location and the facilities were extremely clean and well kept. Would highly recommend!

Trying to book as I received a voucher but cannot because it says Saturday check in or check out is not allowed. What kind of stupid idea is that. I can only stay on the weekend because I have a job but apparently that's not possible and I'm not spending an extra $350 for another night that I don't want.
Excellent campsite with nice facilities. Live music at 8am on a Sunday is not recommended though.
Have returned from our annual week at bright riverside. The best park in bright. Fantastic clean facilities, friendly staff and magnificent location. Cannot wait for 2026

We stayed in the luxury villas. While the accommodation is clean and new, the actual location of the villas and what was shown on the website was a disappointment. Our “view of the river” was actually a view of caravan roofs  and a gazebo. Our deck overlooked a campsite. We literally looked into the setup of a family group, rather than the river. While they were generally quiet and respectful campers, we couldn’t help hearing all their conversations. This wasn’t only when we sat on the deck (which we avoided as it felt weird staring at them while we ate our breakfast) but when we were inside our cabins.

Massively disappointing and won’t book again.

If you don’t mind living on top of other people, proximity to the splash park and town is good. Maybe just book one of the other cabins instead.
Beautiful holiday park, premjum facilities, easily access to all local abstraction. Highly recommended.

There is a significant issue with this property.  Let me start with the many positives.  We stayed in a Luxury Villa.  It was clearly brand new, clean and modern.  The staff were kind and knowledgable and an absolute pleasure to interact with.  The TVs were large, parking was easy and the location of the holiday park to town was excellent.  There were a few negatives - walls are paper thin.  Internet was poor and therefore the smart TVs were not very smart.

The issue is that the advertising and online pictures are misleading at best.  The picture appears to show a clear, unimpeded view of the river, immediate access and privacy.  This is not the case.  As you can see in the park map, there are sites directly in front of the villas.  Tons of them.  And they are between the villas and the river.  This is NOT represented in the pictures online and is misleading.  We spent quite a bit of money and would have chosen to stay at another park for significantly less money had we known.  I'd suggest updating the pictures so other customers are aware and not disappointed.

I recently stayed at Bright Riverside Holiday Park and had a mixed experience. While the location is undeniably fantastic—close to the main street, with easy access to the river for swimming and floating downstream—the accommodation fell short of expectations. We booked the "luxury riverfront villa," which sounded perfect for our family of four, but it wasn’t what we envisioned.

The "villa" itself was clean and spacious enough for us, but the claim of being "riverfront" and "private" was misleading. Despite the description and images on the website, there were campers set up directly in front of the cabins, completely obstructing the view and any sense of privacy. None of the website photos showed this, which felt deceptive. I even called ahead to confirm the details and was assured of riverfront views, a private deck, and WiFi. Technically, these promises were fulfilled, but the reality of being on top of other families camping in front of us—with full visibility into each other’s spaces—made it far from the tranquil escape we had hoped for.

Noise was another issue. The campers in front of us, including a family with young children, were loud enough to disrupt our sleep. The blinds in the bedrooms weren’t blackout, so the rooms were overly bright, and the bedding was uncomfortable. While the main bedroom had a fan, the second bedroom did not, making it unbearably hot for the kids during the summer heat. On top of that, the cabin’s location required us to walk around to access the river, which, while not a huge inconvenience, felt at odds with the "riverfront" label.

For the premium price we paid, the experience didn’t feel worth it. Campers in front of us seemed to have better views and access at a fraction of the cost. While the park’s setting and proximity to town are excellent, the misleading advertising and lack of comfort in the cabin left us disappointed. I wouldn’t book a "luxury" cabin here again and likely wouldn’t return.
In motorhome fantastic extended another night
been there 9 years in a row all very user friendly both the staff and the other guests

I don't often leave reviews but we found this park and its staff outstanding. We felt welcome from the moment we arrived, the front desk staff are so friendly and accommodating. A special thank you to the young man driving the ute that saw me with my toddler at 7am at the site office and stopped to help us. The office wasn't open yet but he gave us coins for the washing machine and made our day. The facilities are the best we have experienced. So clean and well maintained and the mature trees mean there is so much shade and beauty to this park. Incredible location for children its a very short work to the splash park. highly recommend.
Loved staying here! Great location that was close to the splash park and river pool, playground, and shops. The luxury villas are beautifully designed.
Beautiful location

Beautiful clean holiday park
Friendly staff available to help if needed
Cabin clean and plenty of pillows or blankets if needed.
Family friendly and small rock pools in Ovens River to put chair in and sit in river to relax in.

Excellent place to stay in bright. Walking distance to basically everything in bright, went to mountain bike, so mystic is a short ride or drive up the road. Accommodation was new, clean and comfortable with all amenities needed, no fuss check-in and checkout . So peaceful sitting out on the deck listening to the river. Will definitely be back.

This is our favourite holiday park destination. The convenience of accomodation on the waters edge. The continuous gentle sounds of the river navigating the rocks. The intimacy of the river banks: on the one side the village of Bright and on the other Riverview holiday park. The township is within easy walking distance over either of two bridges. The day trips to Falls Creek and Mount Buffalo are recommended.
Absolutely worth the drive from NSW central coast. Next time we hope to bring the grandkids.

The perfect place to holiday or stop for the night. Friendly staff, crystal clear river, new amenities and just across the bridge from the leafy main street. A lovely park to stay! Thanks for looking after us!

We love coming to Bright every year so does our extended family it is now becoming a tradition for us our  children and grandchildren.   The location and facilities are absolutely great.   Plenty of walks and bike rides and places to quench your thirst.

My family and I absolutely love this place! We’ve stayed here the last two cup weekends and have rebooked for next year before our stay ended. The team do an amazing job to keep the park spotless and the location is honestly perfect. Can’t wait to be back next year, enjoying the sunshine by the river with family and friends

What a magical place this is! Our little family stayed in a 3-bedroom Riverfront Villa for a milestone birthday getaway and what a special holiday it was. This park is in the most idyllic location and we had a spectacular view of the river from our villa - we felt incredibly lucky! The villa itself was very well appointed with everything you could possibly need, the park is exceptionally well maintained and the facilities throughout the park were wonderful. We loved the big pink deck chairs, lawn space, fairy lights in the trees, fire pits (our only regret was running out of time to use it!) and the general layout of the villas which meant we felt like we had plenty of private space all to ourselves. We also loved how close we were to the Bright shops to be able to easily pop over to get anything we needed. While we didn't require anything from reception, all the staff we interacted with were so lovely and welcoming. We will definitely be back and are already dreaming of the next holiday here!

Bright Riverside Holiday Park was simply fantastic.  Awesome location, amazing facilities and we stayed in one of their new luxury cabins which was really lovely. Highly recommend as a place to stay when looking to book accommodation for Bright.
My go to caravan park in bright
The location is so picturesque and peaceful, it was the best place we stayed on our holiday. Staff were very welcoming and friendly. Loved being within walking distance to town.

We loved staying here on our recent family holiday, so much so we stayed an extra night. We parked are large family caravan on their new concrete sites. All the staff are all very friendly and accommodating. All facilities are perfectly kept and regularly cleaned. The new cabins look pretty special too, with perfect river views.
The park is perfectly located to access into town.
We can’t wait to come back!

What a waste of upgrading to the luxury river facing cabin and paying an extra $100 while the view is blocked by the caravan parked right in front of it. I would have been better off just booking a river front villa where the caravans are not allowed to park and the view would have been better and the price would have been cheaper. That’s the only negative otherwise the location is amazing

We Stayed at a powered caravan site.
Very impressed with the location of the park.
Cleanliness was exceptional.
Fire pits by the river.
Communal kitchen very clean.
Spacious powered sites for the 19'ft van and car and enough room to set up an awning.

Overall 4.9 stars

It missed out on 5. As the wifi was weak.   I Could check emails and search, the kids couldn't stream.
But they should be riding their bikes anyways.

Besides that - still the best park we have stayed at .

Stay here - you won't be disappointed
Promise..! 😁 🙏
Our Superior Cabin was top quality for a caravan park! 👍
We booked a villa, and I think it’s number one luxury villa we booked ever❤️❤️❤️

We were thrilled with our stay in the world class Luxury Villas, brand spanking new with every accessory and interior design detail you can imagine.  With a gorgeous balcony view of the river a few metres away, spacious, warm, sophisticated and with an epic fireplace!!   Even the team at checkin were brilliant suggesting some excellent local drinks and dinner spots...thank you so much for having us, love love your level of service and well thought out style!
We loved every bit of it, right on the Oven river, walking distance into town, the fire pit, walking/cycling tracks nearby.

This is the best caravan park we have ever stayed at. The location is phenomenal. The staff are super friendly. The faciliaties are exceptional and the cleanest I have ever seen, including a heater in the bathrooms for the cold days. Communal fire pits, right on the river and a 2 minute walk into town, I won't stay anywhere else when I come back to Bright again. Not to mention its one of the cheapest caravan parks in Bright if you are camping!
The luxury villa truly lives up to its name. Everything is brand new. Worth the price

not too bad for a cabin.
overall its ok.

Bright Riverside Holiday Park exceeded my expectations. The location is unbeatable—right on the river and just a short walk to town. The cabins were clean, comfortable, and had everything we needed. The staff were friendly and helpful, making our stay even more enjoyable. The peaceful atmosphere and beautiful surroundings make it a perfect spot for relaxation. Highly recommend for a serene getaway!

Our stay in Villa 21 was bliss! Thank you to the team for being amazing. Room was clean and well appointed. Cosy and roomy. Great amenities and best location right on the river. A really great park, we had a great time at Bright and Hotham. Such a great place to stay.

I recently stayed in Alpine Pod 14, which was a beautiful little cabin-like building. The first night was great and the pod was cozy. However, there were a few issues that impacted our stay. The pod had little to no ventilation, causing condensation on the windows. Additionally, the heater broke at 3:30 AM. When we spoke to the receptionist, we were told that we couldn’t set the heater higher than 20°C, but this information was not provided to us beforehand. Overall, while the pod was charming, the lack of proper ventilation and heater issues were disappointing.

We visited the Bright Riverside Holiday Park last week, and the location is truly amazing. The river view and BBQ facilities made our vacation unforgettable. This place is within walking distance to Woolworths, a gas station, a bar, ski facilities, and all the amenities needed for daily life.

Highly recommended!
We had a fantastic stay last week and will definitely be back. Location is perfect with walking distance to everything in town.

A truly lovely location with great facilities and backed up with outstanding customer service.  The amenities were spotlessly clean, heated and very modern. The camp kitchen was also similarly meticulously well presented.  New accommodation options were being finalised which will only further enhance the appeal to a variety of travellers. Being a short walk to Bright township only makes this location more appealing! Highly recommend.
Great park, very clean, loved the heated amenities. Sheree was so helpful and friendly. We used sites 12 and 13 and it was a great spot. Very easy walk to town. Enjoyed the river walk.
Excellent spot

No better Riverside location in Victoria. We've been several times, makes an unforgettable Christmas location that my kids won't ever forget. I recommend the 2BR units on the river as they're much newer/modern. Also great for camping/caravan. The best thing is how close it is to the free Splash Park, and not far from town.
I am not satisfied with the behaviour of staff.

We stayed at Bright Riverside over the weekend and had a wonderful stay. Its a beautiful place and the staff were all so friendly, we would also like to say thankyou to the staff for the prompt and tactful way that they handled a situation regarding other loud rude guests that were staying in the park. I guess some people just aren't as considerate of other guests as we are.
We loved our stay and will definitely be back!
Mel

I wanted to express my appreciation for how efficiently and professionally you handled the noise complaint that I reported Saturday evening. The guests causing the disturbance were quite rude and disruptive but your team managed the situation with remarkable tact and promptness.
Thankyou for maintaining such a high standard of service and ensuring a pleasant stay for all guests.
We will be back
Jase
Cannot recommend this place enough!

Hey Riverside,

I'm leaving this review in response to your email asking us to remove some of our reviews. We were happy when we first entered the cabins, and the view was okay, but we need to clarify an incident that significantly affected our stay.

Three of our group members were outside the cabin when your staff entered, started shouting, and rolled up the blinds herself. Only those who have experienced such an intrusion can understand how we felt. Imagine how it feels to have someone enter your space uninvited. You had our contact information from the reservation, and this situation could have been handled more appropriately.

Additionally, you mentioned that we exhibited poor behavior. I think you should ask your staff if we said a single word to her. The only thing one of our members said was to inquire about the lockdown time, to which she replied no. When she mentioned cleaning, we asked if she wanted us to do it immediately. Where is the poor behavior in this?

We did not feel at peace until we left, especially knowing we were leaving the next morning. Given this experience, I cannot recommend your establishment.

We have stayed at Bright Riverside Holiday Park every year for the past 5 years and are always blown away with their amazing friendly service and impeccable cleanliness of the park.  Highly recommend this park for any group wanting to relax and unwind with the best location in town!

I am quite disappointed and my experience was not very good with the services and especially with the staff because staff was very rude as she came to our villa and opened the door even some of my family member were standing outside she didn’t excuse them and asked them anything.I don’t like this behaviour even nobody will like it I am sure.

My experience was terrible, we booked 2 villas for two days and we were very excited location was good but services and staff were really miserable. I don’t know how they can treat there customers like this we were there with families and friends for enjoyment not for disrespect. Around 10 pm one of the  member came and without knocking she opened the door and started shouting to low the volume and very rudely she said before leaving clean the villas properly we are not stupid we know that we have to clean. And we were not happy with the services as well no wifi, no towel replacement. I  am very disappointed, I would not recommend this place to anybody.👍

I wish I can given them negative star review. It was a terrible experience during my stay at this park. I expected a peaceful stay at this place, but one of the team member entered our unit without asking even though some of our family members were outside, she could have asked those members to open the door but she started shouting to reduce the volume of the speaker. I was with my family and I do understand that if someone is bothered they can ask to lower the volume, but no, she herself decided to enter our unit and had courage to open our blinds. We all could not sleep that night as we were afraid for our safety.
I really do not recommend this place to anyone.

I am very disappointed with the service, one lady staff enter in the villa around 10:40 in night, she just knock the door and straight way she open door without our permission,
She opened the blind without our permission, no privacy here , no wifi connection, no towel replacements

Respected Bright Riverside Holiday Park i am extremely disappointed with your service because from last night we stay here with my family but I haven’t received wifi service and the bedsheets are not changed by the team.Moreover, your one of the lady team member came in our villa and enter without our permission as well as at 10:40 pm she said us about cleaning so’ these kind of things are not good, therefore’ we do not like this kind of rude service by your team.

Thank You

We love bright as a family and was very excited to stay at the new cabins at Riverside Caravan Park. Cabin number 5 was the cabin we stayed in over this weekend, it was beautiful and great for me and my family. The only problem we had throughout our 3 day stay was the room had a very strong curry smell. The smell was permeated in everything and even made our clothes smell.  Luckly we had the kids own dooners and all our pilows as we would not have been able to sleep in the beds. We've had to come home and wash all our clothes even the ones we never wore during our stay.
As I said the new cabins are really nice but the smell was terrible, luckily we had other friends with us and spend most out time in their cabin.

I was absolutely shocked by how gorgeous this place was . Posted a video in my tiktok which interested many people with how stunning this place is . Will definitely visiting this place again with my whole family . If there was rating above 5 start I would give without hesitation. 👌😍😍

One of the best parks we've been to.
Exceptional kitchen.
Extremely clean facilities.
Great position only short walk to shops , restaurants.
We'll be back

Fabulous park, we come every year and the staff are helpful and most welcoming
The amenities are first class and the park certainly deserve the 5 stars
Great park Close to everything Amenities excellent
Great location and room, but the tv seems cannot connect to the wifi or hotspot.

Beautiful clean organised holiday park.
Stayed in one of the cabins by the river - great view, quiet, you can hear the water running down the stream. 5 minute walk to Bright central. Cabin clean and functional.
Highly recommended.

Right Riverside Caravan Park is a fantastic park.  It is beautifully maintained, clean modern ammenities, friendly helpful staff and in a great location, walking distance into town. We have stayed here a couple of times and are returning again next year.  We have recommended this park to many.  We brought a group of 22 people this year and all had a fabulous experience here.
Booked 3 days in pod for myself and husband. Location was so good. Loved the autumn touch on the town. But the shower wasn’t great. But otherwise the place is awesome
What a beautiful park ! Super clean with modern facilities, staff are helpful in every way, loved having a campfire at night by the river !

Stayed in a 'Superior Villa'.
Great place to stay - close to town, clean, friendly.  The villa looked almost brand new and it was comfortable and nicely done.
But I feel now it was overpriced and I paid too much for the stay.
Just overall beautiful everything

This is a cracking spot right on the river. Visited during the Autumn festival and having visted Bright many times over the years, this was our first time staying here on a powered riverside spot with our Camper Trailer.
You are central to everything, its great for kids as the playground and splash park is just across the river and there are tracks and trails to explore on your doorstep so definately bring your bikes.
The toilet block is heated, modern and regularly attended to.
The riverside spots have a few fire pits along the water's edge (or BYO pit if on other sites) and we brought our own firewood which was wise as the nights and mornings are bitterly cold this time of year. The park will supply firewood for a fee I believe, but don't bank on any lying around because there is none.
A great caravan park with a great vibe. Do remember that as it sits along the river it is a thorougfare for walkers and cyclists from outside the park so put your possessions away at night and lock up your bikes or keep them out of sight.

Great place to stay
Location walk to everything so close
Peaceful gorgeous clean
Would and will recommend to everyone
Incredible location and facilities. The camp kitchen was fantastic as were the toilets and showers .

Caravan sites excellent toilets and showers spotless also heated staff couldn’t be more helpful and friendly park close to everything park was very clean fire wood delivered to you site booked for next year very impressed
All the facilities in the park were spotless. Camping sites were generous and the location is fabulous - next to the river and quick walk into town. One of the nicest parks we’ve stayed in.
We absolutely loved our stay there and will be back there. Found it so relaxing as it’s by the river. Bathrooms etc are cleaned regularly. A close walking to town for shopping or a bite.

We loved staying here! Great location and facilities. We couldn’t book past 5pm so we were just very lucky that we caught the receptionist/manager as they were leaving for the day and were able to get a site. (Unsure if there is a process for late checkin without bookings but that would be great!)

Fantastic holiday park. Very modern facilities including heating/air con inside toilet block & BBQ area. Fantastic location, very central to town & right on the creek. Great service & fire pits/ wood permitted. The only downer is the massive tower power lines running right over the holiday park which you can hear buzz quite loud at night time, apart from that it’s a great park.
Lovely location, friendly staff, clean rooms.
A friendly, clean, picturesque camping ground on the river in Bright. Great service and clean facilities. Highly recommend.
Wonderful place. A pretty town and the accommodation is right on a shallow river, and it's very peaceful listening to the water

We were in a cabin that was directly in front of the river. Lots of grassy areas to sit, fire pits for the evening and it’s walking distance to everything in Bright town centre.

The staff were great. Nothing was too much trouble and they were really helpful from the moment I first booked.
Beautiful, tranquil riverside location. Easy walk to shops. Pristine ammenities. Views of the river from our site. Highly recommend
Lovely spot, tight sites near the river but best spot in the shade and you can watch the river meander past. New amenties block which is super clean. We enjoyed our stay.
Great park, new, clean amenities. Great camp kitchen and all the staff were lovely. Have re-booked for same time next year.  Highly recommended

Lovely park in the best location!
Facilities are always immaculate!
Wonderful place to relax and have a quality time with family.

Mooi aangelegd park, met comfortabele huisjes. De sfeer op het park is uitstekend
Voor de gasten worden activiteiten georganiseerd.
Great park -  excellent facilities and great location.  Exceptionally clean bathrooms and communal kitchen.
You should go once .in summer location awesome.
Location Location Location
Nice view we had an amazing time here. was worth 5 hour drive.

Great location for bright swimming hole and shops/cafes/restaurants. Facilities were new and clean, there were only 4 showers so at peak times before dinner there was a small queue. The plot was on a slight incline so had to correctly position the tent and gazebos. Just to be aware there is a big power line over head which makes some noise but I tuned it out.

Great little park and would stay here again or recommend anyone to stay.

We booked a 3BR riverside villa for 5 days during the X'mas break, and everyone in my family loved it! In addition to the spectacular views of the Ovens river that flows by, the park is conveniently located close to the Bright town centre, shops, restaurants, walking tracks, splash parks, etc. Bubs loved easy access to the river to take a dip or for water play. There's only one onsite parking allocated per villa, so if you've got more than one car, you'd need to park it outside near the reception.

Would love to visit again!

## Alpine Pod Charm with a Missed Opportunity: A Bright Riverside Review

My partner and I recently sought refuge at Bright Riverside Holiday Park and found ourselves nestled in the cozy Alpine Pod. Its compact charm and idyllic riverfront location instantly won us over. However, one small detail left us longing for a glimpse of its intended design.

The queen bed resided comfortably on the ground floor, a welcome relief considering the ladder leading to the loft. While we enjoyed the snug ambiance, we couldn't help but imagine the added spaciousness and unique loft experience the pod was originally conceived for. The thought of relaxing in the loft, nestled under the eaves with the river whispering below, sparked a pang of missed opportunity.

Despite this yearning for the intended layout, the Alpine Pod undoubtedly holds its own. The Ovens River flows serenely just steps away, offering a constant melody of tranquility. The park itself is well-kept and picturesque, with convenient access to the charming town of Bright and its array of activities.

**Here's the lowdown:**

**Pros:**

* Cosy and comfortable pod experience
* Ground floor bed provides easy access
* Stunning Ovens River location
* Well-maintained park with excellent amenities

**Cons:**

* No option to experience the original loft bed layout
* We imagine the loft would offer more spaciousness and unique charm

**Overall:**

We recommend Bright Riverside Holiday Park, especially for couples seeking a cozy and convenient escape. The Alpine Pod offered a delightful experience, but a taste of its original loft design would truly take it to the next level.

**P.S.** Don't miss exploring the vibrant town of Bright and the breathtaking scenery beyond!

This revised review captures your experience accurately, highlighting the positive aspects of the Alpine Pod while gently expressing your desire for the intended loft option. I hope this better reflects your unique perspective on your stay!

COURTESY: Bard

Possibly the best holiday park we’ve stayed in during our trip.

Great facilities and location, not over-crowded even when full. The staff take a huge pride in their site, clearly when they put so much effort in to clean and maintain it. Always got a genuine hello from them and great help for any needs.

Location is amazing just by the river, near the splash park and a walk from the brewery and shops. A really great quality and friendly campsite!

Perfect location...we were lucky to be upgraded on arrival to a riverside site.Facilites were lovely and super clean.Staff very friendly.
We have travelled a lot and this park is one of the best we have experienced. Will certainly recommend it.
Bright is a great place to visit.
A fabulously maintained park. Beautiful camp kitchen & very clean amenities. The location by the river & walking distance to the town was perfect. Would highly recommend staying here.
Best caravan Park

Clean toilet and showers.
So close to everything in Bright.
Great staff.
Beautiful location.
Location perfect , just by the river , walking distance to shops

Best location! Super clean and comfortable cabin! We were right near the river. Wish I could give more than 5 stars! This is my second time back - first time was in a tent, this time in a cabin. Loved every second!

We stayed there for 4 days over the Melbourne Cup weekend. It was lovely! The facilities are new and clean. The location is amazing, walking distance to town and the river. Staff were lovely and very helpful.
Friends of ours and us managed to secure the drive through caravan sites near the front gate. It provided us with so much room for the 2 caravans, 2 big cars and still left plenty of space for the kids to play.
Nice little camping place with good views of the river and close to the town.

We had an awsome powered site! perfect as it was a very generous drive through which was perfect for us as we had a car on a trailer, even when unloaded there was plenty of room. The amenities block & camp kitchen were 1st class, staff are super friendly & extremely helpful, we had a fantastic few days & definitely be back!! Thankyou

We came for the Bright Rod Run and absolutely loved it. This is our 2nd year staying here we stay in a superior villa and it is the best. So clean, very spacious. Friendly staff and service. Everyone is so friendly when we walk past.We never want to leave to go home. Can't wait to be back next year. 😊

What an amazing setting a perfect spot to kick back relax and enjoy
The staff where so friendly and helpful a nice change from other places we stayed
Highly recommend for your next holiday won’t disappoint

The facilities are new and well maintained. The bungalows are well appointed. The powered sites for caravans are good. As a camper on an unpowered site we found the ground very hard to put pegs into.  There were a lot of rocks under the layer of dirt. Overall our experience here was an enjoyable one.

Really nice caravan park situated on the river.  We really enjoyed our stay and I can highly recommend this park.  The sites are well maintained and the staff are friendly and courteous.  Close to town. A short walk over the bridge.

We have just stayed a week at this park in our van. The grounds are immaculate and right on the river. Amenities are first rate, clean, new and heated at night. The staff were seen every day working hard keeping the grounds looking stunning. This park is a great advertisement for the township of Bright.

If you like sleeping off camber and Directly under 66kv transmission lines, then check out site 7. What a doozie, you can actually hear them hum and crack. I guess it could be like rain on a tin roof… maybe?  Unfortunately I didn’t get a picture as I didn’t stay and a refund wasn’t offered but that’s just how it goes, what was odd though is reception didn’t seem surprised when I left.
Cabin was clean and tidy. Wonderful location and friendly staff. We had a great 2 night stay.
Great location. 400mtrs from town.
Great place to stay! Great location, comfortable bed, great shower, will def stay again!
Great place & location! Walking distance to all shops, cafes, restaurants & all other amenities.

We spent the long weekend at the Riverside Holiday Park, Bright and it was fantastic. We had a riverside cabin right next to the Oven's river. The cabin was spacious, facilities fantastic and super clean! The location is walking distance to the main street and the park is serene and simply beautiful. The Canyon walk is well worth it - again starts right outside the Park and sitting next to the river on the deck of the cabin was superb. Highly recommend Bright Riverside Holiday Park for couples and families. Can't wait to be back!
Great weekend away with other families to enjoy and explore the outdoors.
Amazing location, amenities and stay. We thoroughly enjoyed our time at this beautiful holiday park. Thank you BRHP team for your excellent hospitality. We will definitely be back! 😍🥰

Beware before pressing pay on the website. There is a NO REFUND policy and they mean it!
We had booked a riverside campsite, but unfortunately we got got hit by a storm a few days before our stay and our tent was damaged, so we had to cancel our trip.
I spoke to reception, but unfortunately they said the policy is to keep your money. By contrast the Halls Gap Lakeside Tourist Park was great and happily provided a refund.
At least it only cost us $50, but that's money for nothing!

Beautiful spot right on the Ovens river, easy walking distance over bridges to main part of town, roomy sites for our camper trailer. Fire pits and chairs by the creek, warm and clean bathrooms, well equipped camp kitchen. Best holiday park we’ve ever stayed in. Thank you.
Would definitely stay There Again. Found Some undies behind the bathroom door but otherwise cabin was pretty good. Served it's purpose.

We stayed for a snow day tripping weekend.  Really easy late checking, cabin was clean, well equipped and the sheets are those old fashioned thick cotton on bed with electric blankets.  And 400metres to the snow bus stop.  Perfect
A beautiful place to stay just next to the river. The staff are lovely and very helpful! We will be coming back!
Very clean, comfortable, and location excellent.
Fantastic staff and beautiful location.
Had an amazing few days at Bright Riverside Park. Staff were helpful, park was immaculate and it made our trip memorable.

Had a great 4 days at this fabulous Park .
Right on the River very short walk into town and Fantastic amenities  .
Will definitely be back
Definitely one of the best caravan parks in Australia. Staff and facilities 2nd to none. Position in Bright equal to the best anywhere in this great country of ours.
Beautiful place
Amazing spot right in front of the river, playground and brewery.... And a beautiful central town to travel to the surrounding mountains.

We had a lovely couple of nights at bright riverside caravan park. Check in was very easy the location amazing and definitely the cleanest  (and warmest) amenity block we have used! Would highly recommend

Worthy, it is very close to town so you can easily access such as Woolworths,banks, st foods, pizza and st market.
And easily can reach Mt Hotham or Falls creek
Beautiful location close to everything

Lovely camp site with really good facility
Good showers and kitchen.

We had an absolutely wonderful time at Bright Riverside Caravan Park! The location right next to the Ovens River was a dream - the views were stunning and the peaceful ambiance was just perfect for relaxation. Being within walking distance to town was incredibly convenient and allowed us to explore the charming surroundings easily.

The amenities at the park were top-notch - clean and well-maintained facilities that made our stay comfortable and enjoyable. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful throughout our entire stay, making us feel warmly welcomed from the moment we arrived.

Overall, I highly recommend Bright Riverside Caravan Park for anyone looking for a delightful getaway with beautiful river views, easy access to town, great amenities, and a fantastic staff that truly goes above and beyond to ensure a memorable experience. We’ll definitely be returning in the future!
Incredible views, clean and amazing staff. Really has it all.
Great location, family friendly, definitely recommend to anyone
We had a wonderful stay, superior cabin was clean and had everything we needed. Short walk to town and easy booking and check in process

Love staying at the Bright Riverside Holiday Park. The sounds of the river flowing is so relaxing. The park itself is well maintained and fully equipped to accommodate all types of visitors. It’s in a great location close to the Main Street just a short walk away. We will be heading back next year no doubt. Keep up the great work.
Location unbeatable - along the river. Room was tidy, clean, warm and met our needs perfectly. Check in/out smooth as can be. We love Bright and will likely stay here again if it is available.
Good place to stay...
Great place to stay with a nice view of the river. Very short walk to town makes it a great location.  Will be back again.
Great location in the heart of Bright.

My whole family (3 cabins plus one caravan spot) just stayed at BRHP over the last couple of days and it was such a wonderful, enjoyable stay! The crowd was respectful and friendly, the cottages were so warm and cozy and clean, seeing the river outside our window was a real treat for the kids!
We’d love to come back during the summer break and make use out of the park area. Thank you so much for having us, we will most definitely be back again!

We arrived when we had realised, we had been put on a powered concrete site… however we had tents to pitch and gazebos to nail down. Now you can probably see where this puts us in a bit of a pickle… we headed back up to reception, where we were greeted with great service. We explained our pickle. They understood our pickle. We were luckily able to move to a grass site without any pickles. The ammenities were incredible, modern, fresh and immaculate. Squeaky clean. When it was time for a shower, the added touch of the heater and music meant the below freezing temperatures outside felt miles away.  However the kitchen and lounge were certainly not miles away, as they were situated in the middle of the park. Featuring indoor and outdoor cooking areas, lounging areas and even TV’s, along with complementary wifi. The park consists of scattered communal fire pits along the Oven’s River bed. From which I am writing this review from, keeping warm and trying to roast me marshmallows, which is where the only negative of this whole park comes about… the grounds are so well kept and tidy, I CANNOT find myself a stick anywhere to roast my damn marshmallows!!!! Could not recommend this park enough! It is amazing. Helpful and positive staff, camping neighbours and community. If you are looking for a place to stay, look no further, you’ve found it.
Perfect riverside location. Walk to town and the brewery. Fire pits and very clean and well appointed facilities. Going back!!!
We loved our stay. Location was great with a beautiful river view. Close walk to town and other attractions.

Best camping spot for a novice..
You have electricity and plumbing..
powered and unpowered sites for caravans.

They had cool villas aswell..
N the best is their amenities.. heating was centralized..😅
Great camping spot by the river! We went in winter and the toilets were always warmed by the heater, amazing!

amazing location, great family atmosphere. walking distance to all the main shops and parks.
cabins are clean and fully equipped with everything.
love our stays at bright riverside.
Fantastic cabin accommodation in a pristine location. Clean, friendly staff, affordable. Would highly recommend.

Had a really great time. Spend two night there in a superior villa. Cabin was super clean and tidy. well organized place. Specially when we reach there around 6.00pm and ask about late check in. Receptionist organized the key pickup proper way.
Such a beautiful park right on the river with fire drums provided for campers. (BYO wood). Clean, warm, bathroom, toilets and kitchen amenities.
Great spot, great staff,  great facilities

Our family had five cabins in a row for a birthday celebration-  it was perfect. We gathered around the fire in front of our cabins at night which was so convenient. The park is stunning as it is on the river. You can walk absolutely everywhere from the park. If you’re thinking about staying here..do it. You will not be disappointed.
